query: 005827这只基金持仓集中度怎么样，前十大持仓占净值多少

args.sql: WITH ranked AS (SELECT fund_code, nav_ratio, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY fund_code ORDER BY nav_ratio DESC) AS rn FROM fund_holding WHERE date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM fund_holding) AND fund_code = '005827') SELECT h.fund_code, s.fund_name, ROUND(SUM(h.nav_ratio), 2) AS 前10持仓集中度_pct FROM ranked h JOIN fund_size s ON h.fund_code = s.fund_code AND s.date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM fund_size) WHERE h.rn <= 10 GROUP BY h.fund_code, s.fund_name LIMIT 1

plan.rationale: 对基金005827的最新持仓按占净值比降序排名，取前10大持仓的nav_ratio之和作为集中度

notes: 使用最新持仓日期 (SELECT MAX(date) FROM fund_holding)
使用最新规模日期获取基金名称 (SELECT MAX(date) FROM fund_size)
nav_ratio 已是百分点，直接求和
对基金005827的最新持仓按占净值比降序排名，取前10大持仓的nav_ratio之和作为集中度
SQL 由 LLM/规则生成，并经过只读白名单校验和 dry run。
